case_title: APPLEWOOD, ROBIN VS MIKE GARZA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA AC AUTO WRECKERS et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF FILED SHERIFF'S DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE; THE SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS.
PLAINTIFF FILED AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM CHANGING NAME OF THE DEFENDANT AND INCREASING THE AMOUNT WHAT DEFENDANT OWES TO $3500.00
PLAINTIFF FILED AMENDED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ADDING SECOND DEFENDANT.

THE NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF APR-24-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. ASSIGNEE PETER WITH APPEARED, ADVISED HE IS AWARE THAT COURT NOTICES WERE RETURNED, ALSO STATED THAT HE HAS NEW ADDRESS INFORMATION FOR BOTH PARTIES ( DEFENDANTS) AND WILL FILE A DECLARATION WITH THE CLERK IN ROOM 103. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. CANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
